text: What do you do when you see farmers left with tons of good food? For four entrepreneurs from Breda, the answer was simple: take action. In 2023 they founded No Waste Army. With their company – nominated for the ABN AMRO Newcomer Retail Award 2025–2026 – they are shaking up the food chain. Growers Robin and Adriaan were struggling with a surplus of apples and pears.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: For four entrepreneurs from Breda, the answer was simple: take action. In 2023 they founded No Waste Army. With their company – nominated for the ABN AMRO Newcomer Retail Award 2025–2026 – they are shaking up the food chain. Growers Robin and Adriaan were struggling with a surplus of apples and pears. Due to hail damage, no one wanted to take them away, even though the taste was still perfect.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: With their company – nominated for the ABN AMRO Newcomer Retail Award 2025–2026 – they are shaking up the food chain. Growers Robin and Adriaan were struggling with a surplus of apples and pears. Due to hail damage, no one wanted to take them away, even though the taste was still perfect. Or take organic growers Hanneke and Bart. They were left with thousands of kilos of raspberries because the market opted for cheaper ones from Spain.

text: Or take organic growers Hanneke and Bart. They were left with thousands of kilos of raspberries because the market opted for cheaper ones from Spain. Combating food waste. These are just two examples of a major problem. Farmers and growers do not lose their harvest due to failed agreements, foreign competition or because products are not 'beautiful enough'.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: They were left with thousands of kilos of raspberries because the market opted for cheaper ones from Spain. Combating food waste. These are just two examples of a major problem. Farmers and growers do not lose their harvest due to failed agreements, foreign competition or because products are not 'beautiful enough'. Time for a counter-offensive, says [No Waste Army](https://nowastearmy.nl/).

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: Combating food waste. These are just two examples of a major problem. Farmers and growers do not lose their harvest due to failed agreements, foreign competition or because products are not 'beautiful enough'. Time for a counter-offensive, says [No Waste Army](https://nowastearmy.nl/). They pay farmers a fair price, process the saved harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text:
Farmers and growers do not lose their harvest due to failed agreements, foreign competition or because products are not 'beautiful enough'. Time for a counter-offensive, says [No Waste Army](https://nowastearmy.nl/). They pay farmers a fair price, process the saved harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste. A package full of soups, sauces, juices and other non-perishable products. More than 21,000 subscribers receive the box at home every quarter. > “They pay farmers a fair price, process the rescued harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste.”
From outrage to movement.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text:
Time for a counter-offensive, says [No Waste Army](https://nowastearmy.nl/). They pay farmers a fair price, process the saved harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste. A package full of soups, sauces, juices and other non-perishable products. More than 21,000 subscribers receive the box at home every quarter. > “They pay farmers a fair price, process the rescued harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste.”
From outrage to movement. No Waste Army was founded in 2023 out of pure outrage.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text:
They pay farmers a fair price, process the saved harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste. A package full of soups, sauces, juices and other non-perishable products. More than 21,000 subscribers receive the box at home every quarter. > “They pay farmers a fair price, process the rescued harvest into shelf-stable products and put them in their box to prevent waste.”
From outrage to movement. No Waste Army was founded in 2023 out of pure outrage. The four founders – Thibaud van der Steen, Frank Haagen, Jacco Grinwis and Stijn Markusse, also owner of Boerschappen – could not bear to see farmers left with hundreds of millions of kilos of high-quality food.

From outrage to movement. No Waste Army was founded in 2023 out of pure outrage. The four founders – Thibaud van der Steen, Frank Haagen, Jacco Grinwis and Stijn Markusse, also owner of Boerschappen – could not bear to see farmers left with hundreds of millions of kilos of high-quality food. They decided to join forces. “We want to shake up the food chain,” says Thibaud van der Steen.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: No Waste Army was founded in 2023 out of pure outrage. The four founders – Thibaud van der Steen, Frank Haagen, Jacco Grinwis and Stijn Markusse, also owner of Boerschappen – could not bear to see farmers left with hundreds of millions of kilos of high-quality food. They decided to join forces. “We want to shake up the food chain,” says Thibaud van der Steen. "The food box is the means to achieve that mission. Changing the food chain is very noble, but you need turnover, traffic and volume for that.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: The four founders – Thibaud van der Steen, Frank Haagen, Jacco Grinwis and Stijn Markusse, also owner of Boerschappen – could not bear to see farmers left with hundreds of millions of kilos of high-quality food. They decided to join forces. “We want to shake up the food chain,” says Thibaud van der Steen. "The food box is the means to achieve that mission. Changing the food chain is very noble, but you need turnover, traffic and volume for that. Thanks to the commitment of our subscribers, we can make an impact and immediately pay farmers a fair price.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text:
They decided to join forces. “We want to shake up the food chain,” says Thibaud van der Steen. "The food box is the means to achieve that mission. Changing the food chain is very noble, but you need turnover, traffic and volume for that. Thanks to the commitment of our subscribers, we can make an impact and immediately pay farmers a fair price. We expect that we will grow to 23,500 subscribers and a turnover of 4.5 million euros by the end of this year."
A good story leads to explosive growth.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

A good story leads to explosive growth. The approach works.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text:

We expect that we will grow to 23,500 subscribers and a turnover of 4.5 million euros by the end of this year."
A good story leads to explosive growth. The approach works. In two years, No Waste Army has saved almost 1.5 million kilos of food and the number of subscribers has grown explosively. “3,000 new subscribers joined last month,” says Van der Steen. “We would never have dared to dream that in 2023.”. > “We want to shake up the food chain.”.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: Two major supermarket chains have already contacted us for a meeting. Van der Steen: "Up until now it has been just talking, but it is a great compliment that we are seen, while we are so young. We show supermarkets that you can really tackle food waste, if you just want to and put in the effort. Hopefully the day will come when they say: we are going to do this together. Because we do not want to become a supplier, but really fight together against food waste.".

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: Van der Steen sees No Waste Army not only as a food savior, but also as a connector. "We actually have a distribution problem in the Netherlands. On the one hand, food remains on the land, on the other hand, hundreds of thousands of people are dependent on the Food Bank. If we can link the two, everyone will emerge as a winner.". That is why No Waste Army is already setting up separate crowdfunding campaigns for food that the company cannot fit in its boxes.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: "We actually have a distribution problem in the Netherlands. On the one hand, food remains on the land, on the other hand, hundreds of thousands of people are dependent on the Food Bank. If we can link the two, everyone will emerge as a winner.". That is why No Waste Army is already setting up separate crowdfunding campaigns for food that the company cannot fit in its boxes. For example, for five euros you can donate five kilos of 'rescued' carrots to the Food Bank.

metadata.source_title: This is how No Waste Army shakes up the food chain

text: On the one hand, food remains on the land, on the other hand, hundreds of thousands of people are dependent on the Food Bank. If we can link the two, everyone will emerge as a winner.". That is why No Waste Army is already setting up separate crowdfunding campaigns for food that the company cannot fit in its boxes. For example, for five euros you can donate five kilos of 'rescued' carrots to the Food Bank. In this way, 500,000 kilos of fruit and vegetables have already ended up at the Food Bank. > “We actually have a distribution problem in the Netherlands.”.

text: For now, the focus is on further growing and stabilizing the food box. “First things first,” says Van der Steen. "The foundation must be good. We are growing explosively and that has a great impact on our company. We must maintain that." There are also plans to roll out the concept abroad. "We are in an advanced stage of crossing the border.
